race.comment: DARIN NZ (3) brings some good form from Brisbane having placed in his last two outings at Albion Park. Can measure up aided by the low draw. THE ANSWER (5) continued her good form from last campaign with a resuming second at this circuit and distance, coming from the widest barrier to go under by 1.5m. Draws closer to the pegs and is open to improvement. CLASSIC MISSION NZ (8) hasn't raced since October but produced some good form last campaign and should be ready to go off three trials. Something for the Multiples: MASTER CATCH (9)
